claim: Nano Banana in Gemini can visualize furniture and room designs from simple annotated images, making it practical for interior design planning
actionable: Use Nano Banana in Gemini with MS Paint annotations to preview furniture and design changes before purchasing
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For

claim: ChatGPT can perform sentiment analysis on customer call transcripts and generate candlestick charts of sentiment variations over time
actionable: Upload customer call transcripts to ChatGPT with structured prompts to get sentiment analysis and visualization for team feedback
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For

claim: ChatGPT can evaluate solar feasibility from Google Maps images by analyzing roof orientation, shading, electricity rates, and estimating payback periods
actionable: Upload a property's Google Maps image to ChatGPT with questions about solar feasibility to get cost and savings estimates
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For

claim: ChatGPT can detect phishing emails and scams with high accuracy by analyzing sender reputation, offer structure, and institutional references
actionable: When uncertain about an email, copy its full content into ChatGPT and ask for phishing analysis
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For

claim: NotebookLM allows creating study guides, flashcards, podcasts, and video guides from any document, with quiz functionality
actionable: Upload documents to NotebookLM to generate interactive study materials including flashcards, podcasts, and video overviews
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For

claim: Gemini Live with screen sharing can help win Geoguessr by identifying landmarks and architectural styles in street view images
actionable: Use Gemini Live with screen sharing to share your Geoguessr screen and get location identification hints
source_title: 21 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For
